title: New update :)
content:
Now there are user accounts and you can view each other’s profiles this is so exciting.
Also Ned called dad on the verge of tears - dad 😭😭

title: First Blog!
content: Today I created a backend for the website, and now there is a working blog, guest book and a feedback page. If you haven't done this yourself you dont know how cool this is lol. I am writing because i need at least one entry in the blog otherwise the entire page crashes so idk this is kinda forced im just doing this so it doesnt break. :) :)
